value.found_quote: If you are in a managed environment, admins can restrict these behaviors using admin-enforced requirements. For example, they can disallow `approval_policy = "never"` or constrain allowed sandbox modes. See [Admin-enforced requirements (`requirements.toml`)]
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Admin-enforced requirements (requirements.toml) as a feature that lets admins restrict behaviors in managed environments, including a dedicated documentation link. No deprecation or sunset language is present, so it is treated as active.
